pi_items.source: Live environment test: file confirmed at this path, 38907 bytes, owner ga:ga, permissions 0666. Verified via stat command and python-docx parsing (51 paragraphs, 0 tables, 1 section).
Live environment test: path is writable by ga user (tested with python-docx save + delete). Stale output correctly cleared before task start. export_result.sh searches this path first.

Document parsing: 6 main section titles exist: (1) 'Letter to Shareholders' at para[5] (currently Heading 2 — WRONG), (2) 'Company Overview' at para[9] (Heading 1 — correct), (3) 'Financial Highlights' at para[12] (Normal+Bold — WRONG), (4) 'Research Pipeline' at para[22] (Heading 1 — correct), (5) 'Consolidated Financial Statements' at para[28] (Heading 2 — WRONG), (6) 'Risk Factors and Forward-Looking Statements' at para[47] (Heading 1 — correct). Currently only 3 are Heading 1; agent must fix all 6 to Heading 1.

Document parsing: 4 subsection titles exist as Normal+Bold that should be Heading 2: (1) 'Revenue Breakdown' at para[13], (2) 'Operating Expenses' at para[20] — both under Financial Highlights; (3) 'Clinical Programs' at para[23], (4) 'Preclinical Programs' at para[26] — both under Research Pipeline. The metadata says >=3 minimum; actual achievable count is 4. Metadata is correct as a minimum threshold.

Document parsing: The task asks to convert 'the two pipe-delimited data blocks in that section' where 'that section' = Consolidated Financial Statements. That section contains exactly 2 data blocks: (1) Income Statement at para[30-38] with 3 columns (Line Item | FY2024 | FY2023), 10 rows including header; (2) Balance Sheet at para[40-46] with 3 columns (Balance Sheet Item | FY2024 | FY2023), 7 rows including header. Note: a third pipe-delimited block exists at para[15-19] in Financial Highlights (Revenue by Segment, 4 columns, 5 rows) but is NOT in the Financial Statements section and NOT asked to be converted. expected_table_count=2 is correct.

Document parsing: '$142.3M' appears exactly 3 times: (1) para[6] in Letter to Shareholders: 'total revenue of $142.3M', (2) para[14] in Financial Highlights: '$142.3M, distributed across', (3) para[29] in Financial Statements: 'Total revenue of $142.3M'. Also appears as '142.3' (without $ and M) in the Income Statement data at para[31]: 'Total Revenue | 142.3 | 128.7'. The string '$142.3M' with dollar sign appears 3 times as claimed.

Task instruction parameter — the corrected revenue figure the agent must substitute. Not present in the initial document (confirmed by searching full text). Consistent with task description. This is synthetic data so no external source to cross-reference.

Document parsing: '$68.1M' appears exactly 3 times: (1) para[7] in Letter to Shareholders: 'expenditure of $68.1M reflects', (2) para[21] in Financial Highlights/Operating Expenses: 'totaled $68.1M, representing 47.9%', (3) para[29] in Financial Statements: 'R&D expenditure of $68.1M'. Also appears as '(68.1)' in Income Statement data at para[34]: 'Research & Development | (68.1) | (61.2)'. The string '$68.1M' with dollar sign appears 3 times as claimed.
Task instruction parameter — the corrected R&D figure. Not present in the initial document. Consistent with task description. Synthetic data.

Document parsing: 'Phase III' appears exactly 3 times in 3 distinct sentences: (1) para[7]: 'We advanced our lead compound NB-4012 through Phase III clinical trials for non-small cell lung cancer, with topline data expected in Q2 2025.' (2) para[24]: 'NB-4012 (anti-PD-L1/VEGF bispecific): Currently in Phase III registration trial (NOVA-301) for first-line treatment of non-small cell lung cancer.' (3) para[25]: 'NB-7803 (IL-23 inhibitor): Phase III trial (NOVA-302) ongoing for moderate-to-severe ulcerative colitis.' Each is a distinct sentence in a distinct paragraph.

pi_items.source: Task instruction — the text the agent must type for each footnote. Consistent with the task description. Not present in the initial document.

Verified by counting 'Phase III' occurrences in the document: exactly 3 sentences contain 'Phase III' (para[7], para[24], para[25]). Each requires one footnote, so expected_footnotes=3 is correct. Cross-checked by grepping the setup_task.sh Python heredoc for 'Phase III' — exactly 3 occurrences in document text strings.

pi_items.metadata_value: Fictional biotech financials modeled on SEC 10-K annual report structures (revenue segments, R&D expense ratios, balance sheet items typical of mid-cap biotech companies)
pi_items.verified_value: Fictional biotech financials modeled on SEC 10-K annual report structures (revenue segments, R&D expense ratios, balance sheet items typical of mid-cap biotech companies)
pi_items.source: Confirmed synthetic: 'NovaBio Therapeutics' is not a real company (no SEC EDGAR filings, no public records). All financial data is generated by the setup_task.sh Python script using python-docx with hardcoded values. The document structure (cover page, letter to shareholders, company overview, financial highlights, research pipeline, consolidated financial statements, risk factors, forward-looking statements) follows standard SEC 10-K annual report format. The R&D-to-revenue ratio of 47.9% ($68.1M/$142.3M) is realistic for a mid-cap biotech company.

privileged_info_summary: The draft document novabio_annual_report_draft.docx contains 51 paragraphs, 0 tables, and 1 section. It has 6 main section titles that must all become Heading 1: 'Letter to Shareholders' (currently Heading 2), 'Company Overview' (already Heading 1), 'Financial Highlights' (currently Normal+Bold), 'Research Pipeline' (already Heading 1), 'Consolidated Financial Statements' (currently Heading 2), and 'Risk Factors and Forward-Looking Statements' (already Heading 1). There are 4 subsection titles that should become Heading 2: 'Revenue Breakdown', 'Operating Expenses' (under Financial Highlights), 'Clinical Programs', and 'Preclinical Programs' (under Research Pipeline) — all currently Normal+Bold. The Consolidated Financial Statements section contains exactly 2 pipe-delimited data blocks that must be converted to tables: an Income Statement (3 columns: Line Item | FY2024 ($M) | FY2023 ($M), 9 data rows + header) and a Balance Sheet (3 columns, 6 data rows + header). A third pipe-delimited block (Revenue by Segment, 4 columns) exists in Financial Highlights but is NOT asked to be converted. The string '$142.3M' appears exactly 3 times (paragraphs 6, 14, 29) and must be changed to '$147.8M' with Track Changes enabled. The string '$68.1M' appears exactly 3 times (paragraphs 7, 21, 29) and must be changed to '$71.4M' with Track Changes. Note: these amounts also appear without the dollar sign in the Income Statement data rows (142.3 and 68.1) — the task description says 'wherever they appear' so these should arguably be changed too, but the '$X.XM' format appears in prose paragraphs while bare numbers appear in pipe-delimited data. 'Phase III' appears in exactly 3 sentences: paragraph 7 (Letter to Shareholders), paragraph 24 (Clinical Programs, NB-4012), and paragraph 25 (Clinical Programs, NB-7803). Each needs a footnote reading 'Subject to FDA approval timeline revisions.' The agent must also: insert a page break after the cover page (first 5 paragraphs), make the Consolidated Financial Statements section landscape orientation using section breaks, and generate an automated Table of Contents after the cover page. The final document must be saved as novabio_annual_report_final.docx. All data is synthetic (NovaBio Therapeutics is fictional).
